start.welcome_new: Hi! I'm Stager — I track expenses per project and produce a ready-to-share spreadsheet at the end. What I can do: 📷 Send a receipt photo → I recognize amount, vendor, date, category → write to the active project ✍️ /add <amount> [category] [description] — manual entry 📁 /newproject — create a project (several in parallel — fine) 📋 /list — projects with spent / budget, switch active 📊 /report — summary + Excel download 🔗 /invite — invite someone to the active project Start here: /newproject
start.welcome_back:
Welcome back!

📷 photo → auto-record · /add — manual · /list — projects · /report — Excel
start.invite_redeemed:
✅ Welcome to Stager!

/list — your projects
/help — commands
start.invite_used: ⚠️ This invite has already been used.
start.auth_rejected: Bot is private. Ask the owner for an invite.

help.text: Stager — project expense tracker. Projects /newproject — create /list — list & switch /switch — pick active Expenses 📷 Just send a receipt photo /add <amount> [category] [description] Report /report — summary + Excel Misc /invite — issue invite (owner) /cancel — exit dialog

newproject.confirm: Creating: {name} Currency: RUB Confirm with the button or /cancel

projects.no_active: No active project. /list to pick one.

dialog.bad_amount: Couldn't parse the amount. Enter a number, for example 4850 or 4850.50.

photo.ocr_failed:
Couldn't read the receipt 😕
Try another photo or add manually: /add

freetext.no_active: First use /list to choose a project, then I will save it.

report.empty: No expenses in the active project yet.

invite.not_owner: Only the project owner can issue invites.
